question: A remote pilot in command conducting a search operation around a fire scene with a UA briefly loses sight of the aircraft while it is temporarily behind a dense column of smoke. The pilot _____

options.text: may continue the flight without regaining visual line of sight.
must reroute the flight path to maintain visual line of sight.
may continue if the visual line of sight can be maintained for 50% of the route.

classification_notes: Brief loss of sight is not acceptable; VLOS must be maintained.
